title: Impa (adenosine 5'-phosphorimidazolide) Synthesis
author: sprotocols
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to synthesize ImpA which is required to make the intermediate reaction product of RNA/DNA ligases.  This is desirable when the target molecule has a 5'-phosphate because use of an activated linker oligo allows ligation without ATP and avoids self-circularization of the molecule of interest.
steps_raw: This protocol is used to synthesize ImpA which is required to make the intermediate reaction product of RNA/DNA ligases.  This is desirable when the target molecule has a 5'-phosphate because use of an activated linker oligo allows ligation without ATP and avoids self-circularization of the molecule of interest.
